params.text:
# Importing a complex dataset

We import 5 different source files and combine them into a single "bundle". The rest of the workspace will have access to the whole dataset as a set of tables. The contents of the bundle are displayed in the "View tables" box to the right.

:::highlight

# Overview

This workspace loads our dataset and takes the model definition from the Model workspace. After a few pre-processing steps we map the dataset to inputs of the model and kick off training.

:::

# Evaluating the results

For now this is just a simple look at an inference output.
